sourceMovie.title: Baghead
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Baghead (2023) stuck because it commits to its horror premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Alberto Corredor's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Blair Witch Project
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Baghead clicked for you, The Blair Witch Project (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Baghead?
faq.answer: Try The Blair Witch Project, Crimson Peak, Doctor Sleep—each shares DNA with Baghead while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Baghead?
faq.answer: Baghead (2023) is best described as Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Baghead worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
